findings.message: The in ItemBanner has no alt attribute, so it has no accessible name. Screen readers will either skip it or announce the filename, violating WCAG 2.1 SC 1.1.1 (Non-text Content).
findings.suggestion: Add a descriptive alt attribute, e.g. . If the image is purely decorative, use alt="" so assistive tech ignores it.
